recommendations.rationale: Fact table with date dimension key (effective_date_key) used in range filters by v_policy_detail and agg_policy_monthly. Product key used in downstream GROUP BY.
recommendations.ddl: ALTER TABLE {schema}.fact_policy CLUSTER BY (effective_date_key, product_key);
recommendations.conditions: Benefit increases with table size; most impactful above ~1TB (conditional on production volume)

recommendations.rationale: Fact table with date dimension key (incident_date_key) used in range filters by v_claims_analysis and agg_claims_monthly. Policy key used in JOINs to fact_policy.
recommendations.ddl: ALTER TABLE {schema}.fact_claims CLUSTER BY (incident_date_key, policy_key);
recommendations.conditions: Benefit increases with table size; most impactful above ~1TB (conditional on production volume)

recommendations.rationale: Staging table loaded via truncate-reload pattern from external source (OperationalDB). No downstream Time Travel or Fail-safe requirement.
recommendations.conditions: Reduces storage cost by eliminating Fail-safe. Acceptable for transitory staging data.

recommendations.rationale: Staging table loaded via truncate-reload pattern from external source.
Staging table loaded via truncate-reload pattern from external source.
Staging table loaded via truncate-reload pattern from external source.
Staging table loaded via truncate-reload pattern from external source.
Staging table loaded via truncate-reload pattern from external source.
policy_id and policy_number are high-cardinality columns used in equality predicates in v_policy_detail and sp_archive_stale_policies.
recommendations.ddl: ALTER TABLE {schema}.fact_policy ADD SEARCH OPTIMIZATION ON EQUALITY(policy_id, policy_number);
recommendations.conditions: Requires Enterprise Edition or higher. Incurs additional storage and compute cost.

recommendations.rationale: claim_id and claim_number are high-cardinality columns used in equality predicates in v_claims_analysis and sp_validate_claims.
recommendations.ddl: ALTER TABLE {schema}.fact_claims ADD SEARCH OPTIMIZATION ON EQUALITY(claim_id, claim_number);
recommendations.conditions: Requires Enterprise Edition or higher. Incurs additional storage and compute cost.

recommendations.rationale: Converted workload includes reporting views (v_policy_detail, v_claims_analysis, v_exec_kpi_summary) that suggest ad-hoc analytics usage. QAS can accelerate unpredictable analytic queries.
recommendations.ddl: ALTER WAREHOUSE {warehouse_name} SET ENABLE_QUERY_ACCELERATION = TRUE QUERY_ACCELERATION_MAX_SCALE_FACTOR = 8;
recommendations.conditions: Replace {warehouse_name} with actual target warehouse. Billed per-query for accelerated portions.

recommendations.rationale: Star schema fact table with FK relationships to dim_date, dim_product, dim_agent, dim_customer. Informational constraints enable BI tool join inference and Snowflake optimizer join elimination.
recommendations.conditions: Informational only — not enforced by Snowflake. Zero runtime overhead.

recommendations.rationale: Star schema fact table with FK relationships to dim_date, dim_product, dim_customer, fact_policy.
recommendations.conditions: Informational only — not enforced by Snowflake. Zero runtime overhead.

recommendations.rationale: Fact table with FK relationships to dim_customer and fact_policy.
recommendations.conditions: Informational only — not enforced by Snowflake. Zero runtime overhead.

recommendations.rationale: Primary key constraints on all dimension tables for BI tool join inference.
recommendations.conditions: Informational only — not enforced by Snowflake. Zero runtime overhead.

recommendations.rationale: Aggregation table built from INSERT...SELECT joining fact_policy with dim_date, dim_product, dim_agent, dim_customer. Single-statement pattern suitable for Dynamic Table conversion. Would auto-refresh when source facts/dims change.
recommendations.conditions: Requires user to confirm warehouse and target lag. Note: the cross-aggregate UPDATE from agg_claims_monthly would need separate handling.

recommendations.rationale: Aggregation table built from INSERT...SELECT joining fact_claims with dim_date, dim_product, dim_customer. Single-statement pattern suitable for Dynamic Table. Note: receives cross-aggregate UPDATE from agg_policy_monthly — this step would need to be refactored.
recommendations.conditions: Requires user to confirm warehouse and target lag. Cross-aggregate UPDATE must be incorporated into the SELECT or handled separately.

recommendations.rationale: Converted workload follows batch ETL: staging → dimensions → facts → aggregates. Dependency graph shows clear DAG. Streams+Tasks would enable near-real-time incremental refresh.
recommendations.ddl:
-- O7: Streams + Tasks modernization roadmap
-- This is a ROADMAP — not auto-applied.
--
-- Recommended Stream/Task pairs:
--   STREAM on stg_policies  → TASK to MERGE dim_product, dim_agent, dim_customer
--   STREAM on stg_customers → TASK to MERGE dim_customer (SCD2)
--   STREAM on stg_agents    → TASK to MERGE dim_agent (SCD2)
--   STREAM on stg_claims    → TASK to INSERT fact_claims
--   STREAM on stg_payments  → TASK to INSERT fact_payments
--
-- Task DAG root:
--   task_load_staging
--     → task_refresh_dims (dim_product, dim_agent, dim_customer)
--       → task_load_facts (fact_policy, fact_claims, fact_payments)
--         → task_refresh_aggs (agg_policy_monthly, agg_claims_monthly)
--
-- Benefits: Near-real-time refresh, reduced compute (process only changed rows),
-- built-in exactly-once semantics via Stream offsets.
recommendations.conditions: Fundamental architecture change from batch-push to event-driven. Requires thorough testing and operational readiness assessment.

recommendations.rationale: Staging table — transitory data reloaded each batch. Minimal retention sufficient.
recommendations.ddl: ALTER TABLE {schema}.stg_policies SET DATA_RETENTION_TIME_IN_DAYS = 1;
recommendations.conditions: Applies to all stg_* tables: stg_policies, stg_customers, stg_claims, stg_agents, stg_products, stg_payments.

recommendations.rationale: Dimension table — operational recovery for slowly changing data. 14-day retention recommended.
Fact table — audit trail and point-in-time recovery. 90-day retention recommended.
recommendations.conditions: Requires Enterprise Edition for retention >1 day. Standard Edition limited to 0-1 day.

recommendations.rationale: Audit/log table — compliance and investigation support. 90-day retention recommended.
recommendations.ddl: ALTER TABLE {schema}.etl_audit_log SET DATA_RETENTION_TIME_IN_DAYS = 90;
recommendations.conditions: Requires Enterprise Edition for retention >1 day.

recommendations.rationale: Aggregation table — can be rebuilt from source tables. 14-day retention sufficient.
recommendations.ddl:
ALTER TABLE {schema}.agg_policy_monthly SET DATA_RETENTION_TIME_IN_DAYS = 14;
ALTER TABLE {schema}.agg_claims_monthly SET DATA_RETENTION_TIME_IN_DAYS = 14;

recommendations.rationale: Remaining staging tables (stg_customers, stg_claims, stg_agents, stg_products, stg_payments) — same pattern as stg_policies.
